items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Liu Bei carried imperial blood, but he fed his family by weaving mats and sandals.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: The recruitment notice was up. He wanted to fight the rebels, but he had no money, no men, and no army.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Zhang Fei's thunderous challenge pulled Liu Bei out of his sigh.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Zhang Fei had money and men could be gathered. Liu Bei's eyes lit up.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Before the wine arrived, a new shadow moved at the door.
